      "workflows": [
        {
          "file": "_publish_rust_crates.yml",
          "workflow_name": "_publish_rust_crates",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "crates_io"
          ],
          "trigger": "workflow_call",
          "auth_method": "CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN secret",
          "publish_actions": [
            "./.github/actions/rust/post-merge"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [
            "cargo search iggy_common",
            "cargo search iggy_binary_protocol",
            "cargo search iggy"
          ],
          "summary": "Reusable workflow that publishes Rust crates to crates.io in dependency order (iggy_common → iggy_binary_protocol → iggy SDK → iggy-cli). Uses CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN for authentication. Includes wait loops to verify each crate is available on crates.io before publishing dependent crates. Creates git tags after successful publishing unless dry_run mode is enabled. Supports publishing specific crates via comma-separated input list.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "edge-release.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Edge release",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "snapshot_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "github_releases"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to master branch",
          "auth_method": "github.token (GITHUB_TOKEN)",
          "publish_actions": [
            "softprops/action-gh-release@153bb8e04406b158c6c84fc1615b65b24149a1fe"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [],
          "summary": "Publishes rolling 'edge' pre-release binaries and connector plugins to GitHub Releases on every push to master. Creates cross-platform builds (Linux x86_64/ARM64, glibc/musl) of iggy-server, CLI, benchmarking tool, and connector runtime with plugins. Deletes and recreates the 'edge' tag/release on each run. Explicitly marked as non-official ASF release for development/testing purposes.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "post-merge.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Post-merge",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "snapshot_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "crates_io",
            "docker_hub",
            "pypi",
            "npm",
            "maven_central",
            "nuget"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to master branch",
          "auth_method": "secrets inherited from reusable workflow",
          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [],
          "summary": "Auto-publish workflow that detects pre-release/snapshot versions (edge, rc, SNAPSHOT, .dev) of Rust crates and SDKs without corresponding git tags, then publishes them to crates.io, Docker Hub, PyPI, npm, Maven Central, and NuGet. Runs on every push to master. Maven SNAPSHOT versions are republished whenever SDK source files change. All actual publishing is delegated to a reusable publish.yml workflow.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "publish.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Publish",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "crates_io",
            "docker_hub",
            "pypi",
            "npm",
            "maven_central",
            "nuget"
          ],
          "trigger": "workflow_dispatch with manual component selection, or workflow_call from other workflows",
          "auth_method": "secrets (CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN, DOCKERHUB_TOKEN, PYPI_API_TOKEN, NPM_TOKEN, NEXUS_USER/NEXUS_PW, JAVA_GPG_SIGNING_KEY/JAVA_GPG_PASSWORD, NUGET_API_KEY)",
          "publish_actions": [
            "./.github/actions/utils/docker-buildx",
            "./.github/actions/python-maturin/post-merge",
            "./.github/actions/node-npm/post-merge",
            "./.github/actions/java-gradle/post-merge",
            "./.github/actions/csharp-dotnet/post-merge",
            "./.github/actions/go/post-merge"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [],
          "summary": "Multi-ecosystem release workflow that publishes Apache Iggy components to public registries. Supports Rust crates (crates.io), Docker images (Docker Hub), Python SDK (PyPI), Node SDK (npm), Java SDK (Maven Central via Nexus), C# SDK (NuGet), and Go SDK (tag-only). Workflow is manually triggered via workflow_dispatch with component selection, or called from other workflows. Includes dry-run mode, tag creation, multi-arch Docker builds on native runners, and sequential Rust crate publishing to handle dependencies. Validates commits are on master branch before publishing (unless dry_run or workflow_call). Creates git tags after successful publishing.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        }
      ],

          "publish_commands": [
            "./mvnw deploy -Pcheckstyle -DskipTests -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true -B -V"

          "publish_actions": [],

            "git push origin master"

          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "github_releases"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to tags matching v*-alpha*, v*-beta*, v*-test*",
          "auth_method": "GITHUB_TOKEN",
          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [
            "gh release create",
            "gh release upload"
          ],
          "summary": "Publishes pre-release artifacts (alpha/beta/test versions) to GitHub Releases. Builds Apache Baremaps source and binary tarballs, signs them with GPG, generates SHA512 checksums, and uploads all artifacts to a draft pre-release on GitHub. Triggered by version tags with alpha/beta/test suffixes.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "release.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Release",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "github_releases",
            "apache_dist"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to tags matching v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc[0-9]+",
          "auth_method": "GitHub token (GITHUB_TOKEN), Apache SVN credentials (INCUBATOR_SVN_DEV_USERNAME/PASSWORD), GPG signing key",
          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [
            "gh release create",
            "gh release upload",
            "svn import"
          ],
          "summary": "Publishes Apache Baremaps release candidate artifacts (source and binary tarballs with GPG signatures and SHA512 checksums) to GitHub Releases and Apache SVN dist/dev repository. Triggered by release candidate tags (e.g., v1.0.0-rc1). Artifacts are signed with GPG and uploaded to both GitHub Releases (as draft prerelease) and Apache Incubator SVN for voting.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "snapshot.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Nexus",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "snapshot_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "maven_central"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to main branch",
          "auth_method": "Maven server credentials (NEXUS_USER/NEXUS_PW) and GPG signing key configured via setup-java action",
          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [
            "./mvnw deploy -DskipTests -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true -B -V"

          "summary": "This workflow runs CI tests for the GraphAr Spark project, including code formatting checks, building, testing with multiple Spark versions (3.4.3 and 3.5.1), generating JaCoCo coverage reports, and uploading coverage data to Codecov.           ],
          "summary": "Publishes release candidate versions of jitexecutor-native binaries for Linux, macOS, and Windows to Apache Maven staging repository (apache.releases.https).             "surge_sh"
          ],
          "trigger": "workflow_run (triggered by 'SonataFlow Guides Preview - Build' workflow completion on pull_request events)",
          "auth_method": "SURGE_LOCAL_TOKEN secret",
          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [
            "npx surge ./build/site --domain https://sonataflow-docs-preview-pr-${{ steps.pr.outputs.id }}.surge.sh --token ${{ secrets.SURGE_LOCAL_TOKEN }}"
          ],
          "summary": "This workflow publishes documentation preview sites to Surge.sh for pull requests. It is triggered when the 'SonataFlow Guides Preview - Build' workflow completes successfully. The workflow downloads the built site artifact, extracts the PR ID, and deploys the documentation to a PR-specific Surge.sh subdomain (sonataflow-docs-preview-pr-{id}.surge.sh). It then updates the PR with a comment containing the preview URL.",

          "security_notes": []

        {
          "file": "build-push-env-docker.yml",
          "workflow_name": "BuildCompilationEnvDocker - build and publish multi compilation OS env",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "ci_infrastructure",
          "ecosystems": [
            "docker_hub"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to master, release branches (v[0-9]+.*), ci-test, *dev branches when docker/pegasus-build-env/** or workflow file changes; also workflow_dispatch",
          "auth_method": "Docker Hub credentials via secrets.DOCKERHUB_USER and secrets.DOCKERHUB_TOKEN",
          "publish_actions": [
            "docker/login-action@v3",
            "docker/build-push-action@v6"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [],
          "summary": "Builds and pushes Docker images containing compilation environments for multiple OS variants (ubuntu1804, ubuntu2004, ubuntu2204, rockylinux9, and a Go-specific image) to Docker Hub under apache/pegasus:build-env-* tags. These images are used as build environments for CI/CD pipelines, not consumed by end users as release artifacts. Images are tagged with branch names and pushed to Docker Hub.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "build-push-thirdparty.yml",
          "workflow_name": "BuildThirdpartyDocker - build and publish thirdparty",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "ci_infrastructure",
          "ecosystems": [
            "docker_hub"
          ],
          "trigger": "workflow_call",
          "auth_method": "secrets.DOCKERHUB_USER and secrets.DOCKERHUB_TOKEN",
          "publish_actions": [
            "docker/build-push-action@v2.10.0"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [],
          "summary": "This workflow builds and publishes multiple Docker images containing third-party dependencies to Docker Hub under apache/pegasus. The images include source dependencies (thirdparties-src), production binaries (thirdparties-bin), test binaries with various configurations (test, test-asan, test-jemalloc), and production binaries with jemalloc. These are CI infrastructure images used for building and testing the Pegasus project, not end-user consumable artifacts. The workflow is triggered via workflow_call and authenticates to Docker Hub using stored secrets.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "thirdparty-regular-push.yml",
          "workflow_name": "BuildThirdpartyDockerRegularly - build and publish thirdparty every week",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "ci_infrastructure",
          "ecosystems": [
            "docker_hub",
            "ghcr"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to master/release branches, weekly schedule (Monday 2am UTC+8), manual workflow_dispatch",
          "auth_method": "secrets inherited from reusable workflow",
          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [],
          "summary": "Workflow builds and publishes Docker images containing third-party dependencies for CI/CD build environments. Triggered weekly, on push to specific branches when thirdparty/docker files change, or manually. Uses reusable workflow pattern calling './.github/workflows/build-push-thirdparty.yml' for Ubuntu 18.04/20.04/22.04 and Rocky Linux 9. These are CI infrastructure images (pegasus-build-env, thirdparties-src/bin) used for building Pegasus, not release artifacts for end users.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        }
      ],

          "file": "publish-docker.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Publish Docker Image",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "docker_hub"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to branches (snapshot, *.*.*), scheduled daily at 16:00 GMT",
          "auth_method": "DockerHub credentials via DOCKERHUB_USER and DOCKERHUB_TOKEN secrets passed as REGISTRY_USERNAME and REGISTRY_PASSWORD environment variables",
          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [
            "./mvnw -T 4C clean package -Dimage.name=eclipse-temurin:8u422-b05-jdk -Pimage -DskipTests",
            "./mvnw -T 4C clean package -Dimage.name=eclipse-temurin:8u422-b05-jdk -Pimage,release-image-based-on-java8 -DskipTests",
            "./mvnw -T 4C clean package -Dimage.name=eclipse-temurin:17.0.12_7-jdk -Pimage,release-image-based-on-java17 -DskipTests",
            "./mvnw -T 4C clean package -Dimage.name=eclipse-temurin:21.0.4_7-jdk -Pimage,release-image-based-on-java21 -DskipTests",
            "./mvnw -T 4C clean package -Dimage.name=eclipse-temurin:25-jdk -Pimage,release-image-based-on-java25 -DskipTests"
          ],
          "summary": "Publishes Apache Seata Docker images to DockerHub for multiple Java versions (8, 17, 21, 25). Uses Maven with image profiles to build and push images. Triggers on push to snapshot/version branches and daily via cron. Distinguishes between snapshot builds (develop/snapshot/2.x branches) and release builds (version branches) using conditional Maven profiles.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []

          ],
          "summary": "Publishes Maven artifacts to OSSRH (Sonatype OSS Repository Hosting) for snapshot/development branches. Workflow is currently disabled (on: false).           "file": "deploy-oss.yml",
          "workflow_name": "seata website deploy on oss",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "documentation",

            "s3"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to docusaurus branch and scheduled cron (every 12 hours)",
          "auth_method": "Aliyun OSS access key ID and secret passed as CLI arguments",
          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [
            "./aliyun oss cp ./deploy-dist oss://seata-website-cn-hongkong/ --meta Cache-Control:\"max-age=3600\" -r -f -e oss-cn-hongkong.aliyuncs.com --access-key-id ${{ secrets.ACCESS_KEYID }} --access-key-secret ${{ secrets.ACCESS_KEYSECRET }} --region cn-hongkong"
          ],
          "summary": "Builds the Seata website using Node.js/Docusaurus, generates sitemap, submits links to Baidu, and syncs the built website to Aliyun OSS (Object Storage Service) bucket in Hong Kong region. This is a documentation deployment workflow for the Apache Seata project website.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "deploy.yml",
          "workflow_name": "seata website deploy on github",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "documentation",
          "ecosystems": [
            "github_pages"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to docusaurus branch, scheduled every 12 hours",
          "auth_method": "ACTIONS_DEPLOY_KEY secret (SSH deploy key)",
          "publish_actions": [
            "peaceiris/actions-gh-pages@v2.8.0"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [],
          "summary": "This workflow builds and deploys the Apache Seata documentation website to GitHub Pages. It runs on pushes to the docusaurus branch and on a 12-hour schedule. The workflow builds the site using Node.js, generates sitemaps, submits links to Baidu search, and deploys the static site to the asf-site branch using peaceiris/actions-gh-pages action. This is a documentation publishing workflow, not a release artifact workflow.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        }

        "apache_dist"
      ],
      "category_counts": {
        "documentation": 1,
        "snapshot_artifact": 1
      },
      "trusted_publishing": {
        "migration_needed": false,
        "eligible_ecosystems": []
      },
      "security": {
        "total_findings": 7,
        "worst_severity": "MEDIUM",
        "severity_counts": {
          "MEDIUM": 1,
          "LOW": 3,
          "INFO": 3
        },
        "check_counts": {
          "self_hosted_runner": 2,
          "run_block_injection": 1,
          "unpinned_actions": 1,
          "third_party_actions": 1,
          "missing_codeowners": 1,
          "missing_dependency_updates": 1
        }
      },
      "workflows": [
        {
          "file": "nightlies-rsync.yml",
          "workflow_name": "nightlies-rsync.yml",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "documentation",
          "ecosystems": [
            "apache_dist"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to docs/*.md paths",
          "auth_method": "SSH key authentication via secrets (NIGHTLIES_RSYNC_KEY, NIGHTLIES_RSYNC_USER)",
          "publish_actions": [
            "burnett01/rsync-deployments@0dc935cdecc5f5e571865e60d2a6cdc673704823"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [],
          "summary": "Converts markdown documentation to HTML using Pandoc and deploys to Apache nightlies server via rsync. Triggered on pushes to docs/*.md files. Uses SSH key authentication to upload documentation artifacts to remote Apache infrastructure.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "nightlies.yml",
          "workflow_name": "nightlies.yml",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "snapshot_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "apache_dist"
          ],
          "trigger": "push (excluding docs/** paths)",
          "auth_method": "HTTP Basic Auth using secrets.NIGHTLIES_USER and secrets.NIGHTLIES_TOKEN",
          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [
            "curl --user ... --upload-file $OUTFILE https://nightlies.apache.org/ghactions-publishing.html"
          ],
          "summary": "Converts a markdown file to HTML using Pandoc and uploads it to Apache's nightlies server (nightlies.apache.org) via curl with HTTP Basic Auth. This is a snapshot/nightly artifact deployment to Apache infrastructure.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        }
      ],
      "findings": [
        {
          "severity": "INFO",
          "check": "self_hosted_runner",
          "file": "arm-runner-test.yml",
          "detail": "Uses self-hosted runners. Ensure runners are ephemeral.",
          "line": 9
        },
        {
          "severity": "INFO",
          "check": "self_hosted_runner",
          "file": "asf-runner-test.yml",
          "detail": "Uses self-hosted runners. Ensure runners are ephemeral.",
          "line": 9
        },
        {
          "severity": "LOW",
          "check": "run_block_injection",
          "file": "nightlies.yml",
          "detail": "2 instances of direct interpolation in run blocks. Expressions: `secrets.NIGHTLIES_TOKEN`, `secrets.NIGHTLIES_USER`.",
          "lines": [
            18
          ]
        },
        {
          "severity": "MEDIUM",
          "check": "unpinned_actions",
          "file": "(repo-wide)",
          "detail": "3 unpinned third-party action refs (mutable tags, outside actions/*/github/*/apache/*). Top: `docker:/` (2), `scottbrenner/puppet-lint-action` (1)."
        },
        {

          "workflow_name": "InLong Docker Build and Push",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "snapshot_artifact",

            "docker_hub"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to master or release branches (branch-*.*)",
          "auth_method": "DOCKER_USER and DOCKER_PASSWORD secrets",
          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [
            "bash +x publish-by-arch.sh --tag --publish",
            "bash +x publish-by-arch.sh --tag --arch aarch64 --publish",
            "bash +x publish-by-arch.sh --manifest"
          ],
          "summary": "Builds Docker images for Apache InLong components on every push/PR. Publishes multi-arch (x86_64 and aarch64) Docker images to Docker Hub (inlong organization) when changes are pushed to master branch (x86 only) or release branches like 'branch-1.4' (both architectures with manifest). Uses custom shell scripts (publish-by-arch.sh, build-docker-images.sh) for publishing. This is snapshot_artifact because it publishes development/nightly builds from master and release branches, not tagged releases.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        }
      ],

      ],

      },

        "migration_needed": false,
        "eligible_ecosystems": []
      },
      "security": {
        "total_findings": 4,
        "worst_severity": "LOW",
        "severity_counts": {
          "LOW": 3,
          "INFO": 1
        },
        "check_counts": {
          "cache_poisoning": 1,
          "run_block_injection": 1,
          "missing_codeowners": 1,
          "missing_dependency_updates": 1
        }
      },
      "workflows": [
        {
          "file": "build.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Build",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "snapshot_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "maven_central"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to trunk branch on apache/jackrabbit",
          "auth_method": "Maven server credentials via setup-java action (server-username/server-password) with secrets.NEXUS_USER and secrets.NEXUS_PW",
          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [
            "mvn -B ${{ env.MVN_GOAL }} ${{ env.MVN_ADDITIONAL_OPTS }} -Pcoverage,integrationTesting,javadoc -Dorg.ops4j.pax.url.mvn.repositories=\"https://repo1.maven.org/maven2@id=central\""
          ],
          "summary": "This workflow builds Apache Jackrabbit with Maven and conditionally deploys snapshot artifacts to Apache Nexus repository when triggered by push to trunk branch on the canonical apache/jackrabbit repository. The workflow uses 'mvn deploy' with credentials configured via setup-java action's server-id mechanism pointing to 'apache.snapshots.https'. On PRs or forks, it only runs 'mvn install' without publishing. A separate SonarQube analysis job runs for code quality scanning but does not publish artifacts.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        }
      ],
      "findings": [
        {
          "severity": "INFO",
          "check": "cache_poisoning",
          "file": "build.yml",
          "detail": "Uses actions/cache with PR trigger. Verify cache keys are not PR-controlled.",
          "line": 91
        },
        {
          "severity": "LOW",
          "check": "run_block_injection",
          "file": "build.yml",
          "detail": "2 instances of direct interpolation in run blocks. Expressions: `secrets.NEXUS_PW`, `secrets.NEXUS_USER`.",
          "lines": [
            49,
            50
          ]
        },
        {
          "severity": "LOW",
          "check": "missing_codeowners",
          "file": "(missing)",
          "detail": "No CODEOWNERS file. Workflow changes have no mandatory review."
        },
        {
          "severity": "LOW",
          "check": "missing_dependency_updates",
          "file": "(missing)",
          "detail": "No dependabot.yml or renovate.json found. ASF policy requires automated dependency management."
        }
      ]
    },

        {
          "file": "docker_promote.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Promote Release Candidate Docker Image",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "docker_hub"
          ],
          "trigger": "workflow_dispatch",
          "auth_method": "secrets.DOCKERHUB_USER and secrets.DOCKERHUB_TOKEN",
          "publish_actions": [
            "docker/login-action@5e57cd118135c172c3672efd75eb46360885c0ef"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [
            "docker buildx imagetools create --tag $PROMOTED_DOCKER_IMAGE $RC_DOCKER_IMAGE"
          ],
          "summary": "This workflow promotes release candidate Docker images to final release versions on Docker Hub. It is manually triggered via workflow_dispatch with inputs for the RC image name and the promoted image name. The workflow uses docker buildx imagetools to copy/tag the RC image to the final release tag on Docker Hub. This is a release artifact workflow as it publishes versioned release packages (Docker images) to a public registry (Docker Hub) that end users consume.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "docker_rc_release.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Build and Push Release Candidate Docker Image",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "docker_hub"
          ],
          "trigger": "workflow_dispatch",
          "auth_method": "DOCKERHUB_USER and DOCKERHUB_TOKEN secrets",
          "publish_actions": [
            "docker/login-action@5e57cd118135c172c3672efd75eb46360885c0ef"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [
            "python docker/docker_release.py $RC_DOCKER_IMAGE --kafka-url $KAFKA_URL --image-type $IMAGE_TYPE"
          ],
          "summary": "This workflow builds and publishes Apache Kafka release candidate Docker images to Docker Hub. It is manually triggered with inputs for image type (jvm/native), RC docker image tag (e.g., apache/kafka:3.8.0-rc0), and Kafka URL. The workflow uses docker/login-action to authenticate to Docker Hub and executes a Python script (docker_release.py) to build and push multi-architecture images. This is a release artifact workflow as it publishes versioned RC images to the public Docker Hub registry for end-user consumption.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        }
      ],

      "workflows": [
        {
          "file": "publish-docker.yaml",
          "workflow_name": "Publish Docker",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "ghcr"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to master and dev-* branches",
          "auth_method": "GITHUB_TOKEN via docker/login-action",
          "publish_actions": [
            "docker/login-action@v1.10.0"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [
            "docker push ${{ env.HUB }}/linkis:${{ env.DOCKER_VERSION }}",
            "docker push ${{ env.HUB }}/linkis:latest",
            "docker push ${{ env.HUB }}/linkis-web:${{ env.DOCKER_VERSION }}",
            "docker push ${{ env.HUB }}/linkis-web:latest",
            "docker push ${{ env.HUB }}/linkis-ldh:${{ env.DOCKER_VERSION }}",
            "docker push ${{ env.HUB }}/linkis-ldh:latest"
          ],
          "summary": "Publishes Apache Linkis Docker images (linkis, linkis-web, linkis-ldh) to GitHub Container Registry (ghcr.io) on pushes to master and dev-* branches. Images are tagged with both commit SHA and 'latest'. This is a release artifact workflow as it publishes versioned Docker images to a public registry for end-user consumption.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "publish-snapshot.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Publish Snapshot",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "snapshot_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "maven_central"
          ],
          "trigger": "schedule (cron: '0 0 * * *')",
          "auth_method": "Maven settings.xml with ASF_USERNAME and ASF_PASSWORD environment variables from secrets",
          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [
            "./mvnw deploy -s ./.github/asf-settings.xml"
          ],
          "summary": "Scheduled daily workflow that publishes snapshot Maven artifacts to Apache Snapshots repository. Runs on the master branch, sets version to branch-based SNAPSHOT, and deploys using Maven with ASF credentials. Skips tests and javadoc generation during deployment.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        }

      "workflows": [
        {
          "file": "deploy-netlify.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Build and Deploy to Netlify",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "documentation",
          "ecosystems": [
            "netlify"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to dev branches and pull_request_target to dev branches",
          "auth_method": "NETLIFY_AUTH_TOKEN and NETLIFY_SITE_ID secrets",
          "publish_actions": [
            "nwtgck/actions-netlify@v1.2"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [],
          "summary": "This workflow builds a website using npm and deploys it to Netlify for documentation hosting. It triggers on pushes and pull requests to dev branches. The workflow has a critical security vulnerability: it uses pull_request_target (which grants secret access to fork PRs) and directly interpolates the untrusted PR title in the deploy message, creating a potential injection vector.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "deploy.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Build and Deploy",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "documentation",
          "ecosystems": [
            "github_pages"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to dev branches",
          "auth_method": "GITHUB_TOKEN",
          "publish_actions": [
            "peaceiris/actions-gh-pages@v3.8.0"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [],
          "summary": "Builds a Docusaurus/Node.js website and deploys it to GitHub Pages (asf-staging branch) on push to dev branches. Contains a critical security issue: the GITHUB_TOKEN is echoed to logs in the 'Build2' step, which should be removed immediately.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "scheduled-merge.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Scheduled Merge",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "documentation",
          "ecosystems": [
            "github_pages"
          ],
          "trigger": "schedule (cron: 0 0,12 * * *)",
          "auth_method": "GITHUB_TOKEN",
          "publish_actions": [
            "peaceiris/actions-gh-pages@v3.8.0"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [],
          "summary": "Scheduled workflow that merges asf-staging branch content to asf-site branch using peaceiris/actions-gh-pages action. This is a documentation deployment pattern commonly used for Apache project websites, where asf-site branch serves GitHub Pages content.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        }
      ],

          "publish_commands": [
            "./mvnw --show-version --batch-mode --errors --no-transfer-progress -P deploy,release",
            "svn commit --username \"$SVN_USERNAME\" --password \"$SVN_PASSWORD\" -m \"Added \\`${DIST_FILENAME_PREFIX}\\` artifacts for release \\`${PROJECT_VERSION}\\`\""
          ],
          "summary": "This reusable workflow publishes Apache Logging release artifacts to Maven Central (via Nexus staging) and Apache Subversion distribution repository. It performs version management, changelog release, Maven deployment with GPG signing, website building, distribution creation (src.zip, bin.zip with signatures and checksums), and uploads to Apache SVN dist/dev.             "github_releases"
          ],
          "trigger": "tag push (v*) and release published event",

          ],
          "summary": "This workflow builds .NET NuGet packages, runs tests across multiple platforms, and publishes release artifacts. On tag push (v*), it creates a draft GitHub Release with .nupkg/.snupkg files attached. When that release is published, a separate job downloads the release assets and pushes them to NuGet.org using dotnet nuget push. The workflow also generates coverage reports but does not publish them externally (uploaded as GitHub Actions artifacts only).",

          "security_notes": []

      "workflows": [
        {
          "file": "create-docker-image.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Create Docker Image",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "docker_hub"
          ],
          "trigger": "workflow_dispatch",
          "auth_method": "secrets.DOCKERHUB_USER and secrets.DOCKERHUB_TOKEN",
          "publish_actions": [
            "docker/login-action@v4.0.0",
            "docker/build-push-action@v7.0.0"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [],
          "summary": "This workflow publishes versioned Apache ManifoldCF Docker images to Docker Hub (apache/manifoldcf). It is manually triggered via workflow_dispatch with a dropdown selection of specific ManifoldCF release versions (e.g., 2.30-JDK-21, 2.29-JDK-11). The workflow has two jobs: one builds from source code for older releases, another uses pre-built distribution packages for newer releases. Both jobs push multi-platform (linux/amd64, linux/arm64/v8) Docker images tagged as 'latest' and with the specific version number to the public Docker Hub registry.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "create-release-candidate.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Create Release Candidate",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "github_releases",
            "docker_hub"
          ],
          "trigger": "workflow_dispatch",
          "auth_method": "GITHUB_TOKEN for GitHub Releases, DOCKERHUB_USER and DOCKERHUB_TOKEN secrets for Docker Hub",
          "publish_actions": [
            "actions/create-release@v1.1.4",
            "actions/upload-release-asset@v1.0.2",
            "docker/login-action@v4.0.0",
            "docker/build-push-action@v6.10.0"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [],
          "summary": "This workflow creates Apache ManifoldCF release candidates by building binaries, creating a GitHub Release with downloadable artifacts (source, binaries, libraries in zip/tar.gz formats, KEYS, CHANGES.txt), and publishing multi-platform Docker images to Docker Hub with version tags. It is manually triggered by repository maintainers to publish release candidate artifacts for public consumption.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "publish-maven-release.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Publish Release Artifacts",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "maven_central"
          ],
          "trigger": "workflow_dispatch with release version selection",
          "auth_method": "Maven server credentials (NEXUS_USER/NEXUS_PW) and GPG signing with passphrase",
          "publish_actions": [
            "actions/setup-java@v5.2.0"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [
            "mvn -B deploy -DskipTests -DskipITs -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true -Papache-release --threads=1",
            "./mvn org.sonatype.plugins:nexus-staging-maven-plugin:deploy-staged -DskipStagingRepositoryClose=true -DserverId=apache.releases.https -DnexusUrl=https://repository.apache.org -Papache-release"
          ],
          "summary": "Publishes Apache ManifoldCF release artifacts to Apache Maven repository (repository.apache.org). Triggered manually via workflow_dispatch with a choice of predefined release branches. Builds with Ant and Maven, signs artifacts with GPG, and deploys to Nexus staging repository using nexus-staging-maven-plugin. Uses apache-release profile for proper Apache release configuration.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "publish-maven-snapshot.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Publish Snapshot Artifacts",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "snapshot_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "maven_central"
          ],
          "trigger": "workflow_dispatch, push to master branch",
          "auth_method": "Maven settings.xml with server credentials (NEXUS_USER/NEXUS_PW secrets)",
          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [
            "mvn deploy -B -DskipTests -DskipITs -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true"
          ],
          "summary": "Publishes Apache ManifoldCF snapshot artifacts to Apache Snapshots Maven repository (apache.snapshots.https) on push to master or manual trigger. Uses Maven deploy with credentials passed through env block.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "publish-release-candidate-svn.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Publish Release Candidate in ASF SVN",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "apache_dist"
          ],
          "trigger": "workflow_dispatch",
          "auth_method": "apache_credentials",
          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [
            "svn commit"
          ],
          "summary": "This workflow publishes Apache ManifoldCF release candidate artifacts to the ASF SVN distribution repository (dist.apache.org/repos/dist/dev/manifoldcf). It downloads artifacts from GitHub Releases, generates GPG signatures and SHA512 hashes, then commits them to SVN. The workflow is manually triggered with release candidate tag and Apache credentials. Multiple critical security issues exist with direct interpolation of user-provided credentials in shell commands.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        }
      ],

        {
          "file": "release.yaml",
          "workflow_name": "Release",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",

          ],
          "trigger": "workflow_dispatch, push on tags",
          "auth_method": "GITHUB_TOKEN",

            "actions/create-release@v1",
            "actions/upload-release-asset@v1"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [],
          "summary": "Builds native GraalVM binaries for multiple platforms (Linux, macOS, Windows) and architectures (amd64, aarch64), then creates a GitHub Release with downloadable distribution artifacts (.zip and .tar.gz files) for end users to consume.",

      "security": {
        "total_findings": 2,
        "worst_severity": "LOW",
        "severity_counts": {
          "LOW": 1,
          "INFO": 1
        },
        "check_counts": {
          "cache_poisoning": 1,
          "missing_codeowners": 1
        }
      },
      "workflows": [
        {
          "file": "master-build.yml",
          "workflow_name": "master-build",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "snapshot_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "maven_central"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to master branch (excluding docs and markdown files)",
          "auth_method": "Maven settings.xml with NEXUS_USERNAME and NEXUS_PASSWORD environment variables",
          "publish_actions": [
            "actions/setup-java@v4"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [
            "./mvnw -B --errors --activate-profiles ci --no-transfer-progress deploy -DskipTests -DdeployAtEnd"
          ],
          "summary": "This workflow publishes SNAPSHOT versions to Apache Snapshots Maven repository. It triggers on pushes to master branch, skips maven-release-plugin commits, validates the version is a SNAPSHOT, checks that HEAD is current with origin/master to prevent stale deployments, and uses concurrency control to serialize snapshot deployments. The deploy step uses Maven with credentials from organization-wide secrets NEXUS_USER and NEXUS_PW configured via setup-java action.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        }
      ],
      "findings": [
        {
          "severity": "INFO",
          "check": "cache_poisoning",
          "file": "build.yml",
          "detail": "Uses actions/cache with PR trigger. Verify cache keys are not PR-controlled.",
          "line": 47
        },
        {
          "severity": "LOW",
          "check": "missing_codeowners",
          "file": "(missing)",

          "summary": "Publishes snapshot Docker images of Apache OFBiz framework to GitHub Container Registry (ghcr.io/apache/ofbiz). Builds three variants: runtime (framework only), demo (preloaded with demo data), and plugins (framework with all plugins). Images are tagged with branch name + '-snapshot' suffix for branch pushes, or extracted version from git tags. Publishing is conditional on DO_DOCKER_PUSH configuration variable being 'true' to prevent forks from pushing.",

            "maven_central"

          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [
            "mvn deploy -B -DskipTests -DskipITs -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true"
          ],
          "summary": "Publishes Apache Olingo V2 snapshot artifacts to Apache Snapshots Maven repository (apache.snapshots.https) on push to master or manual trigger. Uses Maven deploy with credentials stored in GitHub secrets.",

          "file": "release.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Release",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "github_packages"
          ],
          "trigger": "workflow_dispatch",
          "auth_method": "GITHUB_TOKEN (secrets.RELEASE_TOKEN)",
          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [
            "mvn deploy"
          ],
          "summary": "This workflow publishes Maven artifacts to GitHub Packages as part of a release process. Triggered manually via workflow_dispatch with releaseVersion and snapshotVersion inputs. The workflow sets the release version, builds the project with 'mvn clean install', then deploys to GitHub Packages using 'mvn deploy' with authentication via secrets.RELEASE_TOKEN. After deployment, it commits version changes, creates a GitHub Release, and pushes changes to git branches. This is a release_artifact workflow as it publishes versioned Maven packages to GitHub Packages registry for end-user consumption.",
          "confidence": "high",

      "workflows": [
        {
          "file": "docs.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Docs",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "documentation",
          "ecosystems": [
            "github_pages",
            "s3"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to main branch, tags matching v*, or pull requests to main",
          "auth_method": "GITHUB_TOKEN for GitHub Pages, SSH key (NIGHTLIES_RSYNC_KEY) for rsync deployments",
          "publish_actions": [
            "peaceiris/actions-gh-pages@v4.0.0",
            "burnett01/rsync-deployments@0dc935cdecc5f5e571865e60d2a6cdc673704823"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [],
          "summary": "Builds comprehensive documentation for Apache OpenDAL across multiple language bindings (Rust, Java, Node.js, Python, Ruby, C, Lua, Haskell, C++, OCaml) and integrations. Publishes to GitHub Pages (gh-pages branch) for main branch and release tags, creates staging branches for release candidates, and deploys to an external nightlies server via rsync for tagged releases. All artifacts are documentation-related (API docs, website content).",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "release_dotnet.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Release Dotnet Binding",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "nuget"
          ],
          "trigger": "tag push (dotnet-v*) or manual workflow_dispatch with dotnet_publish=true",
          "auth_method": "NuGet/login action with user Apache.OpenDAL, API key from action output",
          "publish_actions": [
            "NuGet/login@v1"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [
            "dotnet nuget push bindings/dotnet/artifacts/package/*.nupkg --api-key \"${{ steps.login.outputs.NUGET_API_KEY }}\" --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json --skip-duplicate"
          ],
          "summary": "Builds native libraries for Linux, Windows, and macOS, packages them into a NuGet package (DotOpenDAL), and publishes to nuget.org when triggered by dotnet-v* tags or manual dispatch with publish flag enabled.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "release_java.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Release Java Binding",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "maven_central"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to tags matching v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc.[0-9]+",
          "auth_method": "Maven server credentials (NEXUS_STAGE_DEPLOYER_USER/PW) and GPG signing key",
          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [
            "mvnw org.sonatype.plugins:nexus-staging-maven-plugin:deploy",
            "mvnw org.sonatype.plugins:nexus-staging-maven-plugin:deploy-staged"
          ],
          "summary": "Publishes Java bindings (JARs) for Apache OpenDAL to Apache Nexus repository (Maven Central staging) for release candidates. Triggered by RC tags (e.g., v1.2.3-rc.1). Builds native libraries for multiple platforms (Linux x86_64/aarch64, Windows x86_64, macOS x86_64/aarch64), stages them locally, merges staging repositories, and deploys to Apache Nexus using nexus-staging-maven-plugin. Artifacts are signed with GPG and authenticated with Apache Nexus credentials.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "release_nodejs.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Release NodeJS Binding",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "npm"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to tags matching 'v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+*' (release tags) or workflow_dispatch with nodejs-publish input",
          "auth_method": "npm trusted publishing with OIDC (id-token: write permission), GITHUB_TOKEN provided as env var",
          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [
            "npm publish --access public"
          ],
          "summary": "Builds native Node.js bindings for multiple platforms (Linux x86_64/aarch64 glibc/musl, Windows x86_64/aarch64, macOS x86_64/aarch64) using napi-rs, then publishes the package to npm registry. Uses npm trusted publishing with OIDC for secure authentication. Publishes on version tags (v*.*.*) or manual workflow dispatch. Pre-release versions (tags with '-') trigger dry-run only.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "release_python.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Release Python Binding",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "pypi"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to tags matching '*'",
          "auth_method": "OIDC (id-token: write permission)",
          "publish_actions": [
            "pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish@release/v1"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [],
          "summary": "Builds Python wheels for multiple platforms (Windows, macOS Intel/ARM, Linux x86_64/aarch64/armv7, musl variants) using maturin. Publishes to TestPyPI for pre-release tags (containing '-') and to production PyPI for release tags (without '-'). Uses OIDC trusted publishing for secure authentication.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "release_ruby.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Release Ruby Binding",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "rubygems"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to version tags (v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+, v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc.[0-9]+) or workflow_dispatch",
          "auth_method": "OIDC trusted publishing via rubygems/configure-rubygems-credentials (id-token: write permission)",
          "publish_actions": [
            "rubygems/configure-rubygems-credentials@v1.0.0"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [
            "bundle exec rake release",
            "gem exec rubygems-await pkg/*.gem"
          ],
          "summary": "Builds Ruby gems (source and native binaries for x86_64-linux, aarch64-linux, arm64-darwin23) and publishes them to RubyGems. The workflow triggers on version tags and workflow_dispatch. It uses OIDC trusted publishing for authentication and includes sigstore attestation signing. The publish job is currently disabled (if: false). Native gem builds are best-effort and continue-on-error.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "release_rust.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Release Rust Packages",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "crates_io"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to tags (excluding pre-release tags containing '-')",
          "auth_method": "OIDC token via rust-lang/crates-io-auth-action with id-token: write permission",
          "publish_actions": [
            "rust-lang/crates-io-auth-action@b7e9a28eded4986ec6b1fa40eeee8f8f165559ec"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [
            "cargo publish --no-verify"
          ],
          "summary": "Publishes Rust crates to crates.io when version tags are pushed (excluding pre-release tags). Uses OIDC authentication and publishes packages sequentially (max-parallel: 1) in dependency order: core, object_store integration, parquet integration, dav-server integration, and unftp-sbe integration. Includes dry-run testing for the core package.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        }
      ],

          ],

        {
          "file": "image.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Build OpenServerless Streamer",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "docker_hub"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to tags matching '[0-9]*'",
          "auth_method": "Docker Hub credentials via secrets.DOCKERHUB_USER and secrets.DOCKERHUB_TOKEN",
          "publish_actions": [
            "docker/login-action@v3"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [
            "task buildx PUSH=1 TAG=$IMG_TAG"
          ],
          "summary": "Workflow builds and publishes multi-architecture Docker images to Docker Hub (apache namespace) when version tags are pushed. Uses docker/login-action for authentication and buildx for multi-platform builds. The workflow triggers only on numeric tags (e.g., 1.0.0), indicating versioned releases. Images are pushed to registry.hub.docker.com under the apache organization.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        }

          ],
          "trigger": "push to tags matching v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+ or v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc[0-9]+, or workflow_dispatch",
          "auth_method": "GITHUB_TOKEN (implicit permissions: contents: write)",

          ],

            "git push origin \"refs/tags/$TAG\""
          ],
          "summary": "This workflow publishes versioned Go binding releases to GitHub Releases. It builds platform-specific shared libraries (Linux amd64/arm64, macOS amd64/arm64) for Paimon Rust bindings, compresses them with zstd, commits them to a release tag (bindings/go/v*), pushes the tag, and creates a GitHub Release with the compiled artifacts attached. Triggered by version tags or manual dispatch.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "release-rust.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Release Rust",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",

          ],
          "trigger": "push to version tags (v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+) or workflow_dispatch",

            "rust-lang/crates-io-auth-action@v1"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [
            "cargo publish -p ${{ matrix.package }} --all-features"
          ],
          "summary": "Publishes paimon and paimon-datafusion Rust crates to crates.io when version tags are pushed. Pre-release tags (containing '-') only run dry-run checks.           "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []

          "publish_commands": [
            "svn commit",
            "sbt +publishSigned",
            "sbt sonatypeBundleUpload",
            "sbt sonatypeClose"
          ],
          "summary": "This workflow stages Apache Pekko gRPC release candidates to multiple distribution channels: (1) source tarballs to Apache SVN dist/dev repository, (2) source tarballs to Apache Tooling Repository (ATR) using OIDC, and (3) signed binary JARs to Apache Nexus staging repository (Maven Central). The workflow is manually triggered on RC tags and performs GPG signing of all artifacts. It also generates a vote email template for the Apache release process.",

          "file": "stage-release-candidate.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Stage release candidate",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "apache_dist",
            "maven_central"
          ],
          "trigger": "workflow_dispatch with inputs for source-tar-to-svn, source-tar-to-atr, jars, email-template",
          "auth_method": "SVN credentials (PEKKO_SVN_DEV_USERNAME/PASSWORD), GPG signing key (PEKKO_GPG_SECRET_KEY), Nexus credentials (NEXUS_STAGE_DEPLOYER_USER/PW), OIDC for ATR upload",
          "publish_actions": [
            "apache/tooling-actions/upload-to-atr@ca6ed9e095c40db61c42a90db2599bb2fbc2319f"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [
            "svn commit --username \"$PEKKO_SVN_DEV_USERNAME\" --password \"$PEKKO_SVN_DEV_PASSWORD\" --message \"Stage Pekko HTTP $RC_VERSION\" $DIR",
            "sbt \"set ThisBuild / version := \\\"$VERSION\\\"; +publishSigned\"",
            "sbt \"set ThisBuild / version := \\\"$VERSION\\\"; sonatypePrepare; set ThisBuild / version := \\\"$VERSION\\\"; sonatypeBundleUpload; sonatypeClose\""
          ],
          "summary": "This workflow stages Apache Pekko HTTP release candidates by: (1) uploading signed source tarballs to Apache SVN dist/dev repository, (2) uploading to Apache Tooling Repository (ATR), (3) publishing signed binary JARs to Apache Nexus staging repository, and (4) generating a vote email template. It is triggered manually on RC tags and publishes release candidate artifacts to both Apache dist and Maven Central staging for community voting.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        }

            "./.github/actions/sync-nightlies"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [],
          "summary": "Publishes nightly documentation snapshots for Apache Pekko samples. Generates Paradox documentation for multiple sample projects (Java and Scala variants covering FSM, clustering, persistence, sharding, distributed data, gRPC, and Kafka integration), organizes them into a versioned directory structure using the branch name, and uploads to a remote server via rsync over SSH. The workflow runs on a daily schedule at 2 AM UTC and can be manually triggered.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        }
      ],

          "summary": "This workflow builds and publishes multi-architecture Docker images for Apache Pinot to Docker Hub. The workflow builds images for both amd64 and arm64 architectures with multiple base images (11-amazoncorretto, 11-ms-openjdk), then creates and publishes multi-arch manifests to Docker Hub using DOCKERHUB_USERNAME and DOCKERHUB_TOKEN secrets for authentication.",

      "workflows": [
        {
          "file": "nightly.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Nightly Build",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "snapshot_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "maven_central",
            "pypi"
          ],
          "trigger": "schedule (cron: '15 12 * * *') and workflow_dispatch",
          "auth_method": "secrets (NEXUS_USER, NEXUS_PW, TEST_PYPI_API_TOKEN)",
          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [
            "./gradlew publishToApache",
            "make client-nightly-publish"
          ],
          "summary": "Nightly workflow that publishes snapshot artifacts to two registries: (1) Java/Maven SNAPSHOTs to Apache Nexus Repository via Gradle publishToApache task, and (2) Python client nightly builds to Test PyPI via make client-nightly-publish. Runs daily at 12:15 UTC or on manual dispatch. Restricted to apache/polaris repository only.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "release-3-build-and-publish-artifacts.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Release - 3 - Build and Publish Release Artifacts",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "maven_central",
            "apache_dist",
            "helm"
          ],
          "trigger": "workflow_dispatch with dry_run input (default: true)",
          "auth_method": "SVN credentials (secrets.POLARIS_SVN_DEV_USERNAME, secrets.POLARIS_SVN_DEV_PASSWORD) for Apache dist; Nexus credentials (secrets.NEXUS_STAGE_DEPLOYER_USER, secrets.NEXUS_STAGE_DEPLOYER_PW) for Maven; GPG key (secrets.POLARIS_GPG_PRIVATE_KEY) for signing",
          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [
            "svn commit --username \"$SVN_USERNAME\" --password \"$SVN_PASSWORD\" --non-interactive -m \"Stage Apache Polaris ${version_without_rc} RC${rc_number}\"",
            "./gradlew publishToApache closeApacheStagingRepository -Prelease -PuseGpgAgent --info",
            "svn commit --username \"$SVN_USERNAME\" --password \"$SVN_PASSWORD\" --non-interactive -m \"Stage Apache Polaris Helm chart ${version_without_rc} RC${rc_number}\"",
            "svn commit --username \"$SVN_USERNAME\" --password \"$SVN_PASSWORD\" --non-interactive -m \"Update Helm index and artifacthub-repo.yml for ${version_without_rc} RC${rc_number}\""
          ],
          "summary": "This workflow publishes Apache Polaris release candidate artifacts to multiple registries: Maven artifacts to Apache Nexus staging repository (closed but not released), source/binary distributions to Apache dist dev SVN repository, and Helm charts to Apache dist dev SVN repository. It validates that the workflow runs from a release candidate tag (apache-polaris-x.y.z-rcN), builds distributions, signs them with GPG, stages to Apache SVN dev, publishes to Nexus staging, builds Docker images (but does not push them), and creates/stages Helm charts. The workflow includes a dry_run mode (default: true) to prevent accidental releases. This is clearly a release artifact workflow as it publishes versioned release candidates to public Apache distribution channels for community voting.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "release-4-publish-release.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Release - 4 - Publish Release After Vote Success",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "apache_dist",
            "docker_hub",
            "maven_central",
            "helm",
            "github_releases"
          ],
          "trigger": "workflow_dispatch",
          "auth_method": "secrets (SVN_USERNAME, SVN_PASSWORD, DOCKERHUB_TOKEN, DOCKERHUB_USER, NEXUS_STAGE_DEPLOYER_USER, NEXUS_STAGE_DEPLOYER_PW, GITHUB_TOKEN)",
          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [
            "svn mv (Apache dist dev to release)",
            "docker login ghcr.io",
            "./gradlew :polaris-server:assemble :polaris-server:quarkusAppPartsBuild -Dquarkus.container-image.push=true",
            "./gradlew :polaris-admin:assemble :polaris-admin:quarkusAppPartsBuild -Dquarkus.container-image.push=true",
            "gh release create",
            "./gradlew releaseApacheStagingRepository"
          ],
          "summary": "This workflow publishes a final Apache Polaris release after a successful vote. It moves artifacts from Apache dist dev to release space (SVN), publishes Docker images (polaris-server and polaris-admin) to Docker Hub for linux/amd64 and linux/arm64, releases the Nexus staging repository to Maven Central, creates a GitHub release with downloadable artifacts, and transfers Helm charts to the release repository. The workflow validates that it runs from a release branch and that HEAD matches the RC tag being promoted.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "site.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Hugo Site",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "documentation",
          "ecosystems": [
            "github_pages"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to main branch, or workflow_call",
          "auth_method": "secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN",
          "publish_actions": [
            "peaceiris/actions-gh-pages@4f9cc6602d3f66b9c108549d475ec49e8ef4d45e"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [],
          "summary": "Builds Hugo static site documentation and publishes to GitHub Pages (asf-site branch) with custom domain polaris.apache.org. Only runs on push to main branch in apache/polaris repository.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        }
      ],

          ],
          "summary": "This workflow publishes Docker images to GitHub Container Registry (ghcr.io) and optionally Docker Hub when a git tag is created. It pulls a pre-built image from a previous build job, applies version tags based on the git tag (with Java version suffix), and pushes to both registries using docker buildx imagetools.             "docker_hub"
          ],

          "publish_actions": [
            "docker/login-action@v3",
            "docker/build-push-action@v6"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [],
          "summary": "Publishes Apache RocketMQ Docker images to Docker Hub (apache/rocketmq). Runs hourly via cron to check for new RocketMQ releases. Fetches the latest release version from apache/rocketmq repository, checks if corresponding Docker image exists on Docker Hub, and if not, builds and pushes multi-platform (amd64/arm64) images tagged with both 'latest' and the specific version number. Publishing is skipped for pull requests and when the image already exists.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        }

          ],

          ],

This is a snapshot/nightly build workflow for development artifacts.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []

          ],
          "publish_commands": [
            "python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel"
          ],
          "summary": "Publishes Python package to PyPI when version tags are pushed. Workflow builds distribution packages (sdist and wheel) and publishes them to PyPI using the official pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish action.           "confidence": "high",

          "ecosystems": [
            "ghcr"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to any branch",
          "auth_method": "GITHUB_TOKEN with packages:write permission",
          "publish_actions": [],
          "publish_commands": [],
          "summary": "This workflow triggers on push to any branch and calls a reusable workflow (backend.yml) with packages:write permission. The permission grant indicates the called workflow likely publishes Docker images to GHCR. Since this runs on all branch pushes (not just releases), and the workflow is named 'Build' (not 'Release'), this is classified as ci_infrastructure - likely pushing CI cache or test images to GHCR for build acceleration or testing purposes.",
          "confidence": "medium",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "publish-docker.yaml",
          "workflow_name": "publish-docker",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "docker_hub"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to tags",
          "auth_method": "DOCKERHUB_USER and DOCKERHUB_TOKEN secrets",
          "publish_actions": [
            "docker/login-action@v3"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [
            "./mvnw -B clean install -D\"docker.push.skip\"=false"
          ],
          "summary": "Publishes Docker images to Docker Hub when tags are pushed to apache/seatunnel repository. Uses Maven with docker profile to build and push multi-architecture images via docker/login-action and Maven docker plugin with docker.push.skip=false flag.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },

          "publishes": true,

            "docker_hub"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to tags",
          "auth_method": "Docker Hub credentials via secrets (DOCKERHUB_USER, DOCKERHUB_TOKEN)",
          "publish_actions": [
            "docker/login-action@v3"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [
            "helm push seatunnel-helm-*.tgz oci://${{ env.HUB }}"
          ],
          "summary": "Publishes Helm charts to Docker Hub OCI registry (registry-1.docker.io/apache) when tags are pushed. Uses helm package and helm push commands to publish versioned Helm charts for the Apache SeaTunnel project. Authenticates to Docker Hub using stored credentials.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },

      "workflows": [
        {
          "file": "nightly-build.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Nightly - Build",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "snapshot_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "ghcr"
          ],
          "trigger": "schedule (daily at 16:00 UTC) and workflow_dispatch",
          "auth_method": "GITHUB_TOKEN with packages: write permission",
          "publish_actions": [
            "docker/login-action@v3"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [
            "./mvnw -am -pl distribution/proxy -B -Prelease,default-dep,docker.buildx.push -DskipTests -Dproxy.image.repository=${{ env.PROXY }} -Dproxy.image.tag=${{ github.run_id }} clean install",
            "./mvnw -am -pl distribution/proxy-native -T1C \"-Pdocker.push.native.linux\" -Dproxy.native.image.repository=${{ env.PROXY_NATIVE }} -Dproxy.native.image.tag=${{ github.run_id }} \"-DskipTests\" clean package",
            "./mvnw -am -pl distribution/agent -Prelease,default-dep,docker.buildx.push -B -T1C -DskipTests -Dagent.image.repository=${{ env.AGENT }} -Dagent.image.tag=${{ github.run_id }} clean package"
          ],
          "summary": "Nightly build workflow that publishes snapshot Docker images to GitHub Container Registry (ghcr.io). Builds and pushes three types of images: shardingsphere-proxy (JVM), shardingsphere-proxy-native (GraalVM native with multiple variants), and shardingsphere-agent. Images are tagged with github.run_id for nightly identification. Also generates and tests examples, uploading them as GitHub Actions artifacts (ephemeral, not registry publishing). Triggered daily via cron schedule.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "schedule-report.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Schedule - Report",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "documentation",
          "ecosystems": [
            "codecov"
          ],
          "trigger": "schedule (daily at 17:00 UTC) and workflow_dispatch",
          "auth_method": "secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN and secrets.SONARCLOUD_TOKEN",
          "publish_actions": [
            "codecov/codecov-action@v5"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [
            "./mvnw -B clean verify org.sonarsource.scanner.maven:sonar-maven-plugin:sonar -Dsonar.projectKey=apache_shardingsphere -DskipTests"
          ],
          "summary": "Scheduled workflow that generates JaCoCo code coverage reports and uploads them to Codecov, then performs SonarCloud static analysis. Runs daily at 17:00 UTC. The workflow builds the project with Maven, aggregates JaCoCo coverage data, uploads to Codecov for coverage tracking, and runs SonarCloud analysis for code quality metrics. Uses actions/upload-artifact for ephemeral CI storage of the jacoco-report.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        }
      ],

        {
          "file": "publish-docker.yaml",
          "workflow_name": "publish-docker",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "docker_hub",
            "ghcr"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to master branch OR release published",
          "auth_method": "Docker Hub credentials (secrets.DOCKERHUB_USER, secrets.DOCKERHUB_TOKEN) for releases; GitHub token for master branch pushes to GHCR",
          "publish_actions": [
            "docker/login-action@c94ce9fb468520275223c153574b00df6fe4bcc9"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [
            "make build.all docker.push",
            "make push.docker.data-generator"
          ],
          "summary": "Publishes Apache SkyWalking Docker images to Docker Hub (apache/skywalking-oap-server, apache/skywalking-ui) on release events, and to GHCR (ghcr.io/apache/skywalking) on master branch pushes. Builds multi-variant images for Java 11, 17, and 21. Release images are tagged with version numbers and pushed to Docker Hub for public consumption. Master branch images are tagged with commit SHA and pushed to GHCR as snapshot builds.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "skywalking.yaml",
          "workflow_name": "CI",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "ci_infrastructure",
          "ecosystems": [
            "ghcr"
          ],
          "trigger": "pull_request, schedule",
          "auth_method": "GITHUB_TOKEN",
          "publish_actions": [
            "docker/login-action@c94ce9fb468520275223c153574b00df6fe4bcc9"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [],
          "summary": "This is a comprehensive CI workflow for Apache SkyWalking that performs license checks, code style validation, unit tests, integration tests, and extensive E2E testing across multiple configurations. The workflow authenticates to ghcr.io (GitHub Container Registry) using GITHUB_TOKEN in multiple jobs (e2e-test, e2e-test-istio, e2e-test-istio-ambient, e2e-test-banyandb-stages) but does NOT publish any images. The docker/login-action is used solely to pull pre-existing test images from ghcr.io during test execution. Docker images are built locally (docker.all make target, docker build commands) and saved/loaded as GitHub Actions artifacts for use across jobs, but never pushed to any registry. This is purely CI infrastructure for testing purposes.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        }
      ],

          "summary": "This workflow builds native GraalVM images for Apache SkyWalking OAP on Linux (amd64/arm64), publishes multi-arch Docker images to GHCR (always on non-PR runs) and Docker Hub (release only), and uploads native distribution tarballs with checksums to GitHub Releases.     {
      "repo": "apache/sling-org-apache-sling-starter",
      "has_workflows": true,
      "total_workflows": 2,
      "publishes_to_registry": false,
      "ecosystems": [
        "docker_hub"
      ],
      "category_counts": {
        "snapshot_artifact": 1,
        "release_artifact": 1
      },
      "trusted_publishing": {
        "migration_needed": false,
        "eligible_ecosystems": []
      },
      "security": {
        "total_findings": 1,
        "worst_severity": "LOW",
        "severity_counts": {
          "LOW": 1
        },
        "check_counts": {
          "missing_codeowners": 1
        }
      },
      "workflows": [
        {
          "file": "docker-push.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Push Sling Starter Docker images",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "snapshot_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "docker_hub"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to master branch",
          "auth_method": "Docker Hub credentials via secrets.DOCKERHUB_USER and secrets.DOCKERHUB_TOKEN",
          "publish_actions": [
            "docker/login-action@b45d80f862d83dbcd57f89517bcf500b2ab88fb2"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [
            "mvn --batch-mode clean install -Ddocker.platforms=linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -Dmaven.test.skip=true -Ddocker.skip=false -Ddocker.skip.push=false"
          ],
          "summary": "Workflow builds and pushes Apache Sling Starter Docker images to Docker Hub on every push to master branch. Uses Maven with Docker plugin to build multi-platform images (linux/amd64, linux/arm64) and push them to Docker Hub. This is a snapshot/nightly build workflow triggered by commits to master, not versioned releases.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        },
        {
          "file": "docker-release.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Release Sling Starter Docker images",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "release_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "docker_hub"
          ],
          "trigger": "push to tags matching org.apache.sling.starter-**",
          "auth_method": "Docker Hub credentials via secrets.DOCKERHUB_USER and secrets.DOCKERHUB_TOKEN",
          "publish_actions": [
            "docker/login-action@b45d80f862d83dbcd57f89517bcf500b2ab88fb2"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [
            "mvn --batch-mode clean install -Ddocker.platforms=linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -Dmaven.test.skip=true -Ddocker.skip=false -Ddocker.skip.push=false -Ddocker.image.tag=${version} -Ddocker.image.extra.tag=latest"
          ],
          "summary": "Publishes Apache Sling Starter Docker images to Docker Hub when release tags are pushed. The workflow builds multi-platform images (linux/amd64, linux/arm64) using Maven with Docker plugin, tagging them with both the project version and 'latest'. Triggered by tags matching pattern 'org.apache.sling.starter-**', indicating versioned releases.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        }
      ],
      "findings": [
        {
          "severity": "LOW",
          "check": "missing_codeowners",
          "file": "(missing)",
          "detail": "No CODEOWNERS file. Workflow changes have no mandatory review."
        }
      ]
    },

    {
      "repo": "apache/solr",
      "has_workflows": true,
      "total_workflows": 12,
      "publishes_to_registry": false,
      "ecosystems": [
        "docker_hub"
      ],
      "category_counts": {
        "snapshot_artifact": 1
      },
      "trusted_publishing": {
        "migration_needed": false,
        "eligible_ecosystems": []
      },
      "security": {
        "total_findings": 3,
        "worst_severity": "HIGH",
        "severity_counts": {
          "HIGH": 1,
          "MEDIUM": 1,
          "LOW": 1
        },
        "check_counts": {
          "self_hosted_runner": 1,
          "unpinned_actions": 1,
          "missing_codeowners": 1
        }
      },
      "workflows": [
        {
          "file": "docker-nightly.yml",
          "workflow_name": "Nightly Docker Build & Publish",
          "publishes": true,
          "category": "snapshot_artifact",
          "ecosystems": [
            "docker_hub"
          ],
          "trigger": "schedule (daily at 2 AM UTC) and workflow_dispatch",
          "auth_method": "Docker Hub username/password via secrets.DOCKERHUB_USER and secrets.DOCKERHUB_TOKEN",
          "publish_actions": [
            "docker/login-action@v3"
          ],
          "publish_commands": [
            "./gradlew testDocker dockerPush -Psolr.docker.imageRepo=apache/solr-nightly -Psolr.docker.imageTag=${{ steps.tag.outputs.tag }} -Psolr.docker.dist=${{ matrix.dist }} -Psolr.docker.platform=linux/arm64,linux/amd64 -Psolr.docker.baseImage=${{ matrix.base-image }}"
          ],
          "summary": "Publishes nightly snapshot Docker images of Apache Solr to Docker Hub under the apache/solr-nightly repository. Builds multi-platform (linux/amd64, linux/arm64) images for multiple branches (main, branch_10x, branch_10_0, branch_9x) with different JRE versions and distributions (full/slim). Uses Gradle dockerPush task to publish SNAPSHOT versions (11.0.0-SNAPSHOT, 10.1.0-SNAPSHOT, 10.0.0-SNAPSHOT, 9.11.0-SNAPSHOT) on a daily schedule.",
          "confidence": "high",
          "security_notes": []
        }
      ],
      "findings": [
        {
          "severity": "HIGH",
          "check": "self_hosted_runner",
          "file": "tests-via-crave.yml",
          "detail": "Self-hosted runner with PR trigger. External contributors can execute arbitrary code on self-hosted infrastructure with broad permissions.",
          "line": 12
        },
        {
          "severity": "MEDIUM",
          "check": "unpinned_actions",
          "file": "(repo-wide)",
          "detail": "4 unpinned third-party action refs (mutable tags, outside actions/*/github/*/apache/*). Top: `gradle/actions` (1), `docker/setup-qemu-action` (1), `docker/setup-buildx-action` (1), `docker/login-action` (1)."
        },
        {
          "severity": "LOW",
          "check": "missing_codeowners",
          "file": "(missing)",
          "detail": "No CODEOWNERS file. Workflow changes have no mandatory review."
        }
      ]
    },

          "summary": "Test workflow for Apache Trusted Releases (ATR) platform that builds Java artifacts (source tarball and JAR), generates checksums (SHA512/SHA256), simulates GPG signing, and conditionally uploads to Apache's ATR staging platform (release-test.apache.org). This is a snapshot/testing workflow for validating the ATR release process before production use.",
